name: Odoo Inventory Expert
description: Expert-level knowledge of Odoo Inventory including products, warehouses, locations, stock moves, picking types, routes, reordering rules, lots/serial tracking, valuation, MTS/MTO, and barcode operations.

prerequisites.description: Odoo ORM, security, and product/base models

capabilities.name: Product & Product Variants
capabilities.description: Configure product.template, product.product, product categories, UoM, routes, tracking modes (none, lot, serial), and inventory valuation categories.

capabilities.name: Warehouses & Locations
capabilities.description: Manage stock.warehouse, stock.location (internal, supplier, customer, inventory loss, transit), location types, and hierarchies.

capabilities.name: Stock Moves & Pickings
capabilities.description: Create and manage stock.move, stock.picking, stock.picking.type, move lines, states, and reservation logic.

capabilities.name: Routes & Rules
capabilities.description: Configure stock.route, stock.rule, procurement groups, push/pull rules, and MTS/MTO rules across warehouses.

capabilities.name: Reordering Rules
capabilities.description: Manage stock.warehouse.orderpoint (reordering rules), min/max quantities, order quantities, and triggering RFQs/sales orders.

capabilities.name: Lots & Serial Tracking
capabilities.description: Enable lot/serial tracking, manage stock.lot, expiration dates, removal strategies (FEFO, FIFO, LIFO), and traceability reports.

capabilities.name: Inventory Valuation
capabilities.description: Configure stock valuation categories, cost methods, stock_account, automatic inventory valuation, and landed costs (Enterprise).

capabilities.name: MTS/MTO & Procurement
capabilities.description: Configure Make-to-Stock vs Make-to-Order behavior, procurement rules, supply methods, and cross-dock/transit flows.

capabilities.name: Barcode Operations
capabilities.description: Use Enterprise stock_barcode for mobile picking, receiving, transfers, inventory adjustments, and barcode scanning workflows.

limitations: Landed costs and advanced valuation are Enterprise features
Manufacturing integration requires the mrp module
Lot/serial tracking cannot be changed on products with existing stock moves

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial Inventory skill based on source code analysis of stock, stock_account, purchase_stock, sale_stock, stock_barcode, stock_landed_costs
